evaluations.prompt: Replicate the rlm-factory plugin to my other project.
evaluations.expected_behavior: Agent asks for: (1) source path, (2) destination path, (3) mode (additive/clean/link), and (4) whether to dry-run first. It does NOT immediately generate a bash command.

evaluations.prompt: Sync all plugins to /Users/me/Projects/MyApp/plugins/ with clean mode.
evaluations.expected_behavior: Agent proposes a --dry-run first ('Preview what will be changed'), presents the Recap-Before-Execute summary, then waits for confirmation before generating the live command.

evaluations.prompt: I'm in Project_Sanctuary and I want to pull the latest rlm-factory from agent-plugins-skills.
evaluations.expected_behavior: Agent recognizes the pull direction and generates the command with --source pointing to the agent-plugins-skills absolute path and --dest as the local plugins/ folder. Recommends --clean to remove deleted files.

evaluations.prompt: Replicate the nonexistent-plugin to my other project.
evaluations.expected_behavior: Script exits with code 1. Agent reports the source not found error without retrying. It lists available plugins in the source directory and asks the user to confirm the correct plugin name.
